calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-28-2016 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-29-2015 Set For Trial On Apr-18-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Discovery Of Information Pursuant To Penal Code, && 832.7 And 832.8 And Evidence Code && 1043 And 1045 (Pitchess Motion); Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Patricia M. Ford
Off Calendar May-14-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Rosenberg of Emanuel Law Group telephone number 650-369-8900 for Plaintiff Ronald Banta.
Frank Agnost City Attorney telephone number 415-554-3873 for Plaintiff City and County of San Francisco.
Joseph Lee of Maranga Morgenstein telephone number 415-248-5315 for Defendant.

The Parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, DEFENDANT FOX SPORTS PRODUCTIONS, INC.'S Motion For Discovery Of Information Pursuant To Penal Code, && 832.7 And 832.8 And Evidence Code && 1043 And 1045 (Pitchess Motion) is granted with in camera inspection to follow. The moving party is to prepare the order.

Judge Pro Tem: Dennis Hyde. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)

Off Calendar Apr-16-2015 Set For Trial On Nov-23-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Apr-29-2015 Off Calendar
